mapper.select: SELECT mo.order_id, mo.supplier_id, mo.expected_arrived_date, mo.created_by AS handled_by, GROUP_CONCAT(m.material_name SEPARATOR ', ') as material_names, SUM(moi.order_quantity) as total_order_quantity FROM material_order mo JOIN material_order_item moi ON mo.order_id = moi.order_id JOIN material m ON moi.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN material_inbound_item mii ON moi.order_item_id = mii.order_item_id WHERE mo.order_status = '승인' AND mii.order_item_id IS NULL GROUP BY mo.order_id, mo.supplier_id, mo.expected_arrived_date, mo.created_by ORDER BY mo.order_id DESC LIMIT 0, 10

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mo.order_id) FROM material_order mo JOIN material_order_item moi ON mo.order_id = moi.order_id LEFT JOIN material_inbound_item mii ON moi.order_item_id = mii.order_item_id WHERE mo.order_status = '승인' AND mii.order_item_id IS NULL

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.material_id, oi.order_quantity FROM material_order_item oi JOIN material_order mo ON oi.order_id = mo.order_id LEFT JOIN material_inbound_item mii ON oi.order_item_id = mii.order_item_id WHERE mo.order_status = '승인' AND mii.order_item_id IS NULL

SELECT CONCAT('IN-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(inbound_id, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM material_inbound WHERE inbound_id LIKE CONCAT('IN-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_inbound ( inbound_id, order_id, inbound_status, inbound_date, handled_by, created_date, updated_date ) VALUES ( #{inboundId}, #{orderId}, #{inboundStatus}, #{inboundDate}, #{handledBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT inbound_item_id FROM material_inbound_item WHERE inbound_item_id LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY inbound_item_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_inbound_item ( inbound_item_id, inbound_id, order_item_id, material_id, order_quantity, quantity, inbound_status, created_date, updated_date ) VALUES ( #{inboundItemId}, #{inboundId}, #{orderItemId}, #{materialId}, #{orderQuantity}, #{quantity}, #{inboundStatus}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT moi.order_item_id, moi.order_id, moi.material_id, moi.order_quantity, m.material_name, m.unit_price FROM material_order_item moi JOIN material m ON moi.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN material_inbound_item mii ON moi.order_item_id = mii.order_item_id WHERE moi.order_id = #{orderId} AND mii.order_item_id IS NULL

SELECT ii.inbound_item_id, ii.inbound_id, ii.material_id, m.material_name, ii.order_quantity, ii.quantity, ii.warehouse_code, ii.lot_no, ii.expiration_date, ii.inbound_status, ii.order_item_id FROM material_inbound_item ii JOIN material m ON ii.material_id = m.material_id WHERE ii.inbound_id = #{inboundId}
mapper.update: UPDATE material_inbound SET inbound_status = '입고완료', inbound_date = NOW() WHERE inbound_id = #{inboundId}

UPDATE material_inbound_item SET lot_no = #{lotNo}, expiration_date = #{expirationDate}, quantity = #{quantity}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, inbound_status = #{inboundStatus}, lot_created_date = NOW(), unit_price = #{unitPrice}, total_price = #{totalPrice} WHERE inbound_id = #{inboundId} AND material_id = #{materialId}

UPDATE material_inbound SET inbound_date = NOW(), inbound_status = ( SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(i.order_quantity) = SUM(i.quantity) THEN '입고완료' WHEN SUM(i.quantity) = 0 THEN '미입고' ELSE '부분입고' END FROM material_inbound_item i WHERE i.inbound_id = #{inboundId} ) WHERE inbound_id = #{inboundId}
UPDATE material_inbound_item SET inbound_status = '입고완료', lot_created_date = NOW() WHERE inbound_item_id = #{inboundItemId}
mapper.select: SELECT i.inbound_id, i.order_id, i.inbound_status, i.handled_by, i.inbound_date, o.expected_arrived_date AS supply_due_date, o.order_date, o.supplier_id FROM material_inbound i LEFT JOIN material_order o ON i.order_id = o.order_id WHERE i.inbound_id = #{inboundId}
SELECT moi.order_item_id, moi.order_id, moi.material_id, moi.order_quantity AS quantity, moi.unit_price, moi.warehouse_code FROM material_order_item moi WHERE moi.order_item_id = #{orderItemId}
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(inventory_id, -3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM material_inventory WHERE inventory_id LIKE CONCAT('INV-RM-', #{date}, '%')
